channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Potholes Galore, 7th April
item.description:
The whole of this road is covered in potholes, lots of small ones and several deep larger ones.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4a;4b, Chad Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 7th April
item.description:
Cw edge deterioration 1204x504x50mm Rd closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 7th April
item.description:
Cw edge deterioration 900x500x45mm Stats required Rd closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 7th April
item.description:
Cw edge deterioration 1400x507x65mm Rd closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous horses, 7th April
item.description:
Hi I would like to report an incident that occurred on a public right of way. Whilst walking my dog across a field a horse approached me and started pushing me with his head. They then started spinning and tried to kick me missing the first time but kicking me on my upper arm the second time. I was chased and broke in to a run to escape. I'm concerned that it is not safe for public to cross and may have a more serious outcome next time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous horses, 7th April
item.description:
Hi I would like to report an incident that occurred on a public right of way. Whilst walking my dog across a field a horse approached me and started pushing me with his head. They then started spinning and tried to kick me missing the first time but kicking me on my upper arm the second time. I was chased and broke in to a run to escape. I'm concerned that it is not safe for public to cross and may have a more serious outcome next time.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Haywards Lane, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 7th April
item.description:
PERM REPAIR 43119108....Could you raise a perm repair enquiry for HAVERLOCK ROAD - Gloucester o/side 6. A damaged gully cover. Made safe with barriers. USRN 45300361 ( E ) 387276 ( N ) 217735
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree outside my house (11 Bramley Road GL517LL) has fallen into my garden and next doors during storm on wknd, 7th April
item.description:
Miss c king 11 Bramley Road Cheltenham Gl51 7ll

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Russet Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham

item.title: Bush growing out of trunk of tree and overhanging road, 7th April
item.description:
The tree is on the grass verge outside Weston House, 17 Pittville Lawn, Cheltenham, GL52 2BE
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Pittville Lawn, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
